title: phyllorkis thwaitesii
intro: Phyllorkis thwaitesii, also known as Thwaites' orchid or Ceylon orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, and its roots, leaves, and flowers are valued for their medicinal properties, particularly their anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Phyllorkis thwaitesii include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent and a treatment for skin conditions. In Ayurvedic medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion, decoction, or powder for its medicinal uses.
